message:
perf(vdbe): eliminate per-opcode bounds check + gate metrics behind collect flag

V2.3: Two ceremony reductions in the VDBE dispatch loop:

1. Remove pc >= ops.len() bounds check: all programs terminate via OP_Halt
   (codegen guarantee), so the bounds check is always false on the hot path.
   Replaced with debug_assert for safety during development.

2. Gate opcode execution totals behind collect_vdbe_metrics: the
   local_opcode_execution_totals Option check was evaluated on every
   opcode even when metrics collection was disabled. Now gated behind
   the bool flag that's already checked once at loop entry.

Combined savings: ~1-2ns per opcode × 7 opcodes per INSERT = ~7-14ns/row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
